doc_title_en: Notice Regarding Determination of Matters Concerning Acquisition of Treasury Stock

key_facts.method: Market purchase under treasury stock acquisition contract
key_facts.reason_jp: 株主還元の充実および資本効率の向上

summary_en: TOKYO BASE authorized repurchase of up to 1.5M shares (3.4% of outstanding) for max ¥500M via market purchases through June 30, 2026, to enhance shareholder returns and capital efficiency.
summary_jp: TOKYO BASEは株主還元充実と資本効率向上を目的に、最大150万株（発行済の3.4%）、5億円上限で市場買付による自己株式取得を決議。
tag_en: Buyback · 1,500,000 shares (3.4% S/O) · ¥500M · Market purchase · May 19 – Jun 30, 2026
tag_jp: 自己株式取得 · 150万株（発行済の3.4%） · 5億円 · 市場買付 · 2026年5月19日～6月30日
